sql_array: CREATE TABLE centuries_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO centuries_data (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2000-01-01');
INSERT INTO centuries_data (id, event_time) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '1800-05-15');
SELECT id, event_time, century(event_time) AS century_value FROM centuries_data;
UPDATE centuries_data SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-10-10' WHERE id = 1;
